introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa dharka, agabka, cabbirka, qiimaha, isbarbardhigga, too/enough, one/ones, lacag-bixinta, online shopping, receipts iyo codsiyada celinta. Dhammaan alaabta, dukaamada, qiimayaasha iyo dalabyadu waa mock.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dharka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, tusaalooyin English A2 ah iyo hawlo shopping oo mock ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Dharka caadiga ah.
Adeegso qaabka Clothing singular and plural si sax ah.
Samee speaking iyo writing task wax iibsi oo edeb leh.
